src: A sleek gray cat with short fur and bright green eyes. It has pointed ears and whiskers that fan out.
edit: A blocky, pixelated Minecraft cat figure made of gray bricks. It has green square eyes, pointy ears with upward-facing blocks, and an angular surface texture, maintaining a digital aesthetic.

per_image_non_shared_src.00: the object upright on a light wood floor, viewed from above, slightly looking to the top left. A thick rope runs beside it, and the floor has subtle wood grain patterns.
per_image_non_shared_src.01: The object lies on its side on a light wood floor, paws forward, head turned to the bottom right corner, surrounded by leather straps. The room has soft lighting, a modern interior, and a couch in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.02: the object is lying on a patterned bedspread, front legs extended and upper body raised, looking to the side, with a light background and dark abstract shapes; a headboard and lamp are visible in the background.
per_image_non_shared_src.03: The object sits upright on a white shelf with all four paws visible, looking slightly to the side, surrounded by a vase of pastel tulips and framed artwork in a softly lit modern minimalist room.
per_image_non_shared_src.04: The object is lying on a dark blanket on a window sill, body stretched along the fabric, gazing through a rain-speckled window. Soft light highlights the blanket texture and raindrops.

per_image_non_shared_edit.00: The object stands upright on a dark floor, viewed from above, subtly gazing towards the dimly illuminated top left corner. A thick rope snakes across the floor with faint wood grain patterns in deep midnight hues.
per_image_non_shared_edit.01: The object lies on its side on a dark wood floor, paws forward, head turned to the bottom right. It's surrounded by leather straps in shadowy hues. Dim lights illuminate the scene, with a modern couch casting shadows across the floor.
per_image_non_shared_edit.02: The object is lying on a deep-hued bedspread, front legs extended, upper body elevated, gazing sideways. A headboard is dimly visible in the background, with a star-like lamp emitting a warm glow, enhancing the nighttime ambiance.
per_image_non_shared_edit.03: The object is sitting upright on a shadowy shelf, with silhouetted eyes glinting sideways. It's surrounded by a vase of muted tulips and framed artwork in a night-themed setting, gently illuminated by moonlight, enhancing the mystical scene.
per_image_non_shared_edit.04: The object is on an ebony blanket on a window sill, elongated along the dark fabric, peering through the rain-dappled window. Moonlight illuminates the blanket's textures and raindrops, creating a serene night scene.
